hero.title: Discover Samarkand With Us
hero.subtitle: Certified guide Shohista — your gateway to the world of ancient architecture and Silk Road history

about.title: Meet Your Guide
about.subtitle: Certified specialist with deep knowledge of history
about.description: I'm a certified guide for Samarkand and Shahrisabz. I am a tour organiser — my team includes professional guides in Russian, English, Turkish and French. We'll show you all the beauty of Samarkand — from the majestic Registan to the quiet alleyways of the old city. Every tour is a living history of the Great Silk Road.

tours.title: Where We Go
tours.subtitle: 11 landmarks of Samarkand & Shahrisabz + nature tours

items.name: Bibi-Khanym Mosque
highlights: One of Central Asia's largest mosques

items.name: Siyob Bazaar
highlights: Vibrant atmosphere of an Eastern bazaar

items.name: Zaamin — Uzbek Switzerland
items.description: Zaamin is a land of pristine nature, known as the 'Swiss Alps of Uzbekistan'. The perfect trip to recharge and enjoy the silence of the mountains!
highlights: Glass suspension bridge — thrilling emotions over the canyon
Cable car — panoramic mountain views from above
Zaamin Reservoir — turquoise beauty among the cliffs

items.name: Seven Lakes — Fann Mountains
items.description: Seven Lakes — a journey into the heart of Tajikistan's Fann Mountains, where each lake changes colour from turquoise to deep violet. Tajikistan is closer than it seems.
highlights: All seven lakes — magic of colour from turquoise to violet
Legends and history of each lake

items.question: What languages do you conduct tours in?
items.answer: I conduct tours in Russian, Turkish, and English. We'll find the most comfortable communication option for each guest.

items.question: How do I book a tour?
items.answer: Reaching us is easy — choose any convenient way: 📱 WhatsApp or Telegram: +998 88 395 41 41 · 📸 Instagram: shohista_guide · 📧 Email: mukhtarova.shokhista(at)mail.ru · or fill out the form on the website. We'll reply within 2 hours and arrange the perfect time for your tour.

items.question: Is transport included in the price?
items.answer: Transport is already included in most of our tours. Clarify this when booking — we'll always find the optimal solution.

items.question: What is the minimum group size?
items.answer: The minimum group size is 1 person. We work with both individual tourists and groups of up to 10 people.

items.question: Can the route be changed?
items.answer: Of course! All routes are flexible and adapted to your interests. Tell us what you're interested in advance — we'll create the perfect tour.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: Payment is accepted in cash (USD or UZS) or by transfer. Tour pricing is agreed individually at the time of booking — no hidden fees.

items.question: How long is the overview tour of Samarkand?
items.answer: The standard overview tour of main attractions takes 4-5 hours. We can make it shorter or longer as you wish.

items.question: Do I need a visa to visit Uzbekistan?
items.answer: Citizens of CIS countries can enter Uzbekistan without a visa. For other countries, we recommend checking visa requirements on the official Uzbekistan MFA website.

items.question: When is the best time to visit Samarkand?
items.answer: The best time is spring (April-May) and autumn (September-October). Comfortable temperatures and fewer tourists. But we work year-round!
